name: Clover | Choose Your Own Scenario (Undertale Red & Yellow)
description:
Clover from the Undertale Red & Yellow mod. The setting is post-pacifist route, after they've been brought back to life. They are currently living with Martlet & Flowey. The bot is assuming that you and Clover both live on the surface. Frisk IS their own separate character and is the ambassador within this bot, though, so things might get weird if you use a persona that's meant to take their place. Haven't tested that myself.

The "choose your own scenario" nature of this bot is pretty easy to understand; the opening message will tell you how to get started.

Clover has been aged up here to about their early twenties, because I'm not about to have them be underage on JanitorAI. Also within the canon of this particular bot, they are nonbinary, and their, ahem, anatomy is left unspecified(not mentioned at all actually). If your intent is to get freaky with this bot, then you'll have to tell it the kind of anatomy you want them to have. Might not always listen to you though. This bot was primarily made for fluff, anyway.

Let me know if you discover any issues with it, please and thank you! This was made mostly for myself, but I figured I'd open it up for anyone to use.

Recent Edits:

11/28/2025: Updated definition to match the changes to Clover's personality made in the combined Chara and Clover bot I created. Clover might behave a little differently.
creator: AzureStarlight
